likely_failure_mode: Weak 12V battery or alternator failure
recommended_action: Test battery and charging system; replace if below spec

likely_failure_mode: Fouled spark plugs or failing ignition coil
recommended_action: Replace spark plugs; test ignition coils; check fuel injectors

description: Engine Coolant Temperature Circuit Low Input
likely_failure_mode: Failed ECT sensor or wiring short
recommended_action: Replace ECT sensor; inspect wiring harness

likely_failure_mode: Fuel injector leaking or O2 sensor fault
recommended_action: Inspect fuel injectors; replace faulty O2 sensor; check MAF sensor

likely_failure_mode: Dirty or failing MAF sensor
recommended_action: Clean or replace MAF sensor; check air filter

likely_failure_mode: Failed camshaft position sensor
recommended_action: Replace camshaft position sensor; inspect timing chain

likely_failure_mode: Degraded catalytic converter or O2 sensor fault
recommended_action: Inspect catalytic converter; replace if below efficiency threshold

likely_failure_mode: Vacuum leak or failing fuel pump
recommended_action: Check for vacuum leaks; test fuel pressure; inspect MAF sensor

description: Coolant Temperature Below Thermostat Regulating Temperature
likely_failure_mode: Stuck-open thermostat
recommended_action: Replace thermostat; inspect coolant level

likely_failure_mode: Dirty throttle body or IAC valve failure
recommended_action: Clean throttle body; replace IAC valve if needed

likely_failure_mode: Severe HV battery cell degradation (SOH < 70%)
recommended_action: Full battery pack inspection; possible replacement

likely_failure_mode: DC/DC converter efficiency degradation
recommended_action: Test and replace DC/DC converter

likely_failure_mode: Thermal management failure; risk of thermal runaway
recommended_action: Immediate vehicle shutdown; HV battery inspection; do not charge

likely_failure_mode: Cell balancing failure or degraded cells
recommended_action: BMS inspection; cell balancing or module replacement

likely_failure_mode: Motor winding degradation or inverter fault
recommended_action: Motor and inverter inspection; replace if necessary

likely_failure_mode: Inverter or regen control fault
recommended_action: Inspect inverter and regen control module

likely_failure_mode: Insulation breakdown in HV circuit
recommended_action: Immediate inspection of HV wiring and battery isolation

likely_failure_mode: OBC module failure
recommended_action: Test and replace on-board charger

description: Right Front Wheel Speed Sensor Circuit Fault
likely_failure_mode: Failed wheel speed sensor or ABS ring damage
recommended_action: Replace wheel speed sensor; inspect ABS tone ring

description: Left Front Wheel Speed Sensor Circuit Fault
likely_failure_mode: Failed wheel speed sensor or ABS ring damage
recommended_action: Replace wheel speed sensor; inspect ABS tone ring

description: Right Rear Wheel Speed Sensor Circuit Fault
likely_failure_mode: Failed wheel speed sensor or ABS ring damage
recommended_action: Replace wheel speed sensor; inspect ABS tone ring

description: Left Rear Wheel Speed Sensor Circuit Fault
likely_failure_mode: Failed wheel speed sensor or ABS ring damage
recommended_action: Replace wheel speed sensor; inspect ABS tone ring

likely_failure_mode: ABS module hardware failure
recommended_action: Replace ABS control module; bleed brake system

likely_failure_mode: Brake fluid leak or worn brake pads
recommended_action: Inspect brake lines for leaks; check brake pad thickness; refill fluid

description: Tire Pressure Monitor Sensor - Front Right Fault
likely_failure_mode: Low tyre pressure or failed TPMS sensor
recommended_action: Check and inflate tyre; replace TPMS sensor if needed

description: Tire Pressure Monitor Sensor - Front Left Fault
likely_failure_mode: Low tyre pressure or failed TPMS sensor
recommended_action: Check and inflate tyre; replace TPMS sensor if needed

description: Tire Pressure Monitor Sensor - Rear Right Fault
likely_failure_mode: Low tyre pressure or failed TPMS sensor
recommended_action: Check and inflate tyre; replace TPMS sensor if needed

description: Tire Pressure Monitor Sensor - Rear Left Fault
likely_failure_mode: Low tyre pressure or failed TPMS sensor
recommended_action: Check and inflate tyre; replace TPMS sensor if needed

likely_failure_mode: BCM hardware or software failure
recommended_action: Reprogram or replace BCM

likely_failure_mode: Incorrect BCM configuration after replacement
recommended_action: Reprogram BCM with correct vehicle configuration

likely_failure_mode: Blown fuse or failed lighting module
recommended_action: Inspect and replace fuse; check lighting wiring

likely_failure_mode: Failed window regulator motor or switch
recommended_action: Test window motor and switch; replace faulty component

likely_failure_mode: CAN bus failure or ECM power loss
recommended_action: Inspect CAN bus wiring; test ECM power supply; replace ECM if needed

description: Lost Communication with Instrument Panel Cluster
likely_failure_mode: CAN bus or cluster module failure
recommended_action: Inspect CAN wiring; replace instrument cluster

description: Invalid Data Received from Vehicle Dynamics Control Module
likely_failure_mode: CAN message corruption or module fault
recommended_action: Inspect CAN bus; reprogram or replace VDC module

description: Lost Communication with Anti-Lock Brake System Control Module
likely_failure_mode: ABS module CAN failure
recommended_action: Inspect CAN wiring to ABS; replace ABS module

likely_failure_mode: Widespread CAN bus failure or shorted line
recommended_action: Full CAN network scan; replace shorted node

likely_failure_mode: HV battery age and cycle degradation
recommended_action: Battery SOH assessment; inform customer of expected range reduction

likely_failure_mode: Motor controller overheating due to cooling failure
recommended_action: Inspect motor cooling system; check coolant pump and flow

likely_failure_mode: Failed PEPS module or antenna
recommended_action: Diagnose PEPS module; replace antenna or module
